figures.caption: Fig. 2: Qualitative label-correction results on representative samples from three datasets under the proposed SplitFed-CL framework, showing (a) accurate, (b) inaccurate, and (c) corrected labels. Labels in the red box correspond to real-world ISIC T2/S2 annotations.
Fig. 1: SplitFed DeepLabV3+ architecture: client-side FE/BE sub-models with a server-side sub-model for heavy computation. ResNet50 [20] is used as the encoder backbone.
